name: Build Rockors SKU APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3
        with:
          gradle-version: '8.4'

      - name: Build release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Generate keystore and sign APK
        run: |
          keytool -genkeypair \
            -alias rockors \
            -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 \
            -keystore rockors.jks \
            -storepass rockors2024 -keypass rockors2024 \
            -dname "CN=Rockors,O=Rockors,C=RS" -noprompt

          $ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/34.0.0/apksigner sign \
            --ks rockors.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:rockors2024 \
            --key-pass pass:rockors2024 \
            --ks-key-alias rockors \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/Rockors-SKU.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk

      - name: Upload APK artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: Rockors-SKU
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/Rockors-SKU.apk
          retention-days: 90
